calendar.matters:
Second Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On Peremptory Writ
Off Calendar Jan-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Bradley Keith Moores, Esq. 619-742-8612 for Petitioner who is present in-person.
Greg Chambers, Esq. 628-230-7205 Attorney General's Office for Respondent.

ARGUED. Mr. Moores contests the tentative ruling and argues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER WILLIAM MOORES , AN INDIVIDUAL Second Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On Peremptory Writ

Petitioner William Y. Moores' petition for writ of mandate is denied.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Second Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On Peremptory Writ
Off Calendar Jan-07-2025 Continued To Jan-21-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER WILLIAM MOORES' Motion For Judgment On Peremptory Writ.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Continued to January 21, 2025, on the court's motion.

Judge: Barbara A. Zuniga; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/BAZ)

First Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On
Peremptory Writ
Off Calendar Oct-02-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. HARRIET NEWMAN, Esq. of California Attorney General's Office (Tel: 628-230-7205) for Respondent Medical Board of California;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER WILLIAM MOORES's First Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On Peremptory Writ.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. Petitioner failed to lodge a copy of the administrative record with the court. The record is necessary for this court to rule on the petition. (Buckhart v. San Francisco Residential Rent etc., Bd. (1988) 197 Cal.App.3d 1032, 1036.) In addition, petitioner failed to provide courtesy copies of his filings in compliance with SF Local Rule 2.7B.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On Peremptory Writ
Off Calendar Jun-25-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Bradley K. Moores, Esq., (619) 742-8612 brad@bradleymoores.com, Attorney for Petitioner, William Y. Moores, M.D.
Greg Chambers, Esq., OFFICE OF THE ATTORNEY GENERAL, 415-510-3382 greg.chambers@doj.ca.gov Attorney for Respondent, Medical Board of California

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER WILLIAM MOORES' Motion For Judgment On Peremptory Writ is taken off calendar for non-compliance with meet and confer efforts. Parties are ordered to comply with Rules of Court regarding meet and confer efforts. A new motion may be noticed Monday through Thursday at 9:30 a.m.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
